div.h2: reactor_register: Immediate vs Deferred epoll_ctl Path

p.em: Handler table updated immediately in both branches; only epoll_ctl is deferred

div.p: Safe: only modifies handlers[] array. Dispatch loop reads handlers[fd] at top of each iteration, not inside a callback.
Side effect: if closing == 1, this resets it to 0 — un-cancels a reactor_deregister from earlier this tick.

KEY INVARIANT handlers[fd] is the authoritative source of truth for which callback fires next. It is always written immediately — before any epoll_ctl call (deferred or not). The epoll kernel state is eventually consistent with handlers[fd] after Phase 2.
